response: "Develop a Java method that converts a string to title case, excluding certain small words unless they are the first word. Create a list of exceptions like 'of', 'the', 'is', 'and'. Ensure the first letter of the string is capitalized. Process the input string 'this is the string to be converted' accordingly. Include the keyword 'you' in the 18-th sentence, as the 12-th word of that sentence. Keep words with all capital letters under 34 instances. Limit the letter 'r' to fewer than 6 occurrences. Wrap the entire response in double quotation marks."
